nasb.text: So it shall be on the day when you cross the Jordan to the land which the Lord your God gives you, that you shall set up for yourself large stones and coat them with lime

esv.text: And on the day you cross over the Jordan to the land that the Lord your God is giving you, you shall set up large stones and plaster them with plaster.

cnv.text: 將來你們過約旦河，到了耶和華你的　神賜給你的土地的那一天，你要立起幾塊大石頭，墁上石灰。

ccb.text: 你们渡过约旦河、进入你们的上帝耶和华应许给你们的土地那天，要竖立几块大石，涂上石灰。
